svg.aria-label: SPIRA — Sound Pipeline Inference Review and Annotation
svg.title: SPIRA — Sound Pipeline Inference Review & Annotation
svg.desc: Logo: a waveform-modulated spiral mark in a cyan-to-purple-to-pink gradient, beside the SPIRA wordmark and full acronym, set over layered sine-wave backgrounds extended across the banner.

g.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
